markets.question: Games Total: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Hero JiuJing and Team WE in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 15 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if Hero JiuJing and Team WE play 5 or more games in this series.

If fewer than 5 games are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Hero JiuJing and Team WE in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 15 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Hero JiuJing" if Hero JiuJing win the match against Team WE.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE win the match against Hero JiuJing.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. markets.question: Spread: Charlton Athletic FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming EFL Championship game, scheduled for April 3 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Charlton Athletic FC" if Charlton Athletic FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bristol City FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on efl.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between LGD NBW and Talent Gaming in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 15 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "LGD NBW" if LGD NBW win the match against Talent Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Talent Gaming" if Talent Gaming win the match against LGD NBW.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Games Total: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between LGD NBW and Talent Gaming in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 15 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if LGD NBW and Talent Gaming play 5 or more games in this series.

If fewer than 5 games are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game Handicap: TTG (-1.5) vs LGD NBW (+1.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between LGD NBW and Talent Gaming in the King Pro League Stage 3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 15 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Talent Gaming" if Talent Gaming wins 2 or more games than LGD NBW in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "LGD NBW".

markets.question: Spread: Once Caldas (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Colombia Primera A game, scheduled for April 2 at 9:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Once Caldas" if Once Caldas win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Independiente Medellín".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on dimayor.com.co. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
